ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., FISI) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "ipo_year" INTEGER /* Year of initial public offering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_industry_map" (
  "sector_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector-industry mapping */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector name */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "date_accessed" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the market indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the market indicator */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the news event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the news event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on stock prices */,
  "date_occurred" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the event to the stock market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol predicted */,
  "date_predicted" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted stock price */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the strategy */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the strategy */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the strategy */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Investment goal of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance period */,
  "return" REAL /* Return on investment */,
  "risk" REAL /* Risk associated with the strategy */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Requirement of the regulation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance with the regulation */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Date when the compliance was last reviewed */,
  "review_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of review for the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrity check */,
  "date_checked" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of integrity check performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integrity check */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the integrity check results */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the check failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used for the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Range of the training data */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the training data was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message describing the error */,
  "error_level" TEXT /* Level of the error (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "error_details" TEXT /* Details of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id")
)
